_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Lead the improvement of data system design processes that affect the success and continuation of key programs.
reference_document_element_description: Design and lead enterprise data and AI transformation programs, including operating model redesign, capability development roadmaps, and organizational change management.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-S-008 (OP, cosine: 0.569), DA-T-005 (DA, cosine: 0.567).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.3/10 (raw 0.633). Shared vocabulary: [data, design, lead, programs]. DCWF-only terms [affect, continuation, improvement, key, processes, success] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, capability, change, development, enterprise, management] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.889, R=0.879). Balanced P/R — the 17-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Lead the improvement of data system design processes that affect the success and" and "Design and lead enterprise data and AI transformation programs, including operat" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.592 ≈ STS 0.633 (gap 0.041). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, design, lead, programs] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.9%. Shared tokens: [data, design, lead, programs]. DCWF-only: [affect, continuation, improvement, key, processes, success]. WIDAI-only: [ai, capability, change, development, enterprise, management].
